name: Tanner
description: Works hides into leather using methods that smell terrible and take patience. Lives on the edge of town by necessity, not choice.
dialogue_hooks: apologizing for the smell before you even mention it
judging the quality of your leather armor or boots
mentioning unusual animals seen near the tanning stream
needing specific hides and willing to pay a premium
complaints about being excluded from town events
voice_patterns: warm once trust is earned — loyal to those who visit
technical — talks about leather like a sommelier talks about wine

schedule.evening: cleaning up, sometimes trading at the edge of market
schedule.night: alone at home on settlement outskirts
